items.title: Profile
items.description: Cloud Data Engineer with a double master's degree in Industrial Engineering and Smart Industry. That mix gave me strong adaptability and problem-solving instincts, and a passion for Big Data, the Cloud and the Web.

items.title: Technologies and tools
items.description: My main field is cloud and data. From there I've branched into web development, CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code (Terraform) and self-hosted Docker setups for my HomeLab. AWS, Python and Terraform are my daily drivers.

items.title: Background
items.description: I've shipped work as a Cloud Data Engineer, Data Engineer, Data Scientist and Fullstack Developer. SQL data models, cloud architectures, ETL pipelines, full-stack web apps and AI-powered tooling are all part of my track record.

items.title: Awards and Achievements
items.description: AWS Certified Solutions Architect, AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner and winner of the IV Hackathon in collaboration with Prosegur and ICAI.
